title: Fig. 4. A in Widespread geographic distribution of filarioid nematodes in caribou (Rangifer tarandus sspp.) in Canada
author: Thomas, Aparna Mariyam
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Fig. 4. A duplex droplet digital PCR plot showing positive droplets: S. yehi (blue), O. cervipedis s.l. (green) and negative droplets (black). Channels A12 to F12 represent individual samples; G12 is the positive control; H12 is the negative control.
